deadline_notes: CPE period: July 1 – June 30. CPE reporting deadline: August 1. License renewal: January 1.
notes: Three-date confusion: CPE period ends June 30, reporting due August 1, license renewal January 1. 1hr of ethics must cover Mississippi Public Accountancy Law & Regulations. QAS-approved self-study only. 20hr personal development cap. 20hr carryover (not for ethics, does not reduce annual minimum). Rolling 120hr/3yr also applies.
